description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Conda Build that runs on pull requests, workflow dispatch, and push to the stable branch. Use a matrix strategy to build with multiple Python versions (3.7-3.12) on ubuntu-latest. For each job, set up Miniforge, install build tools, configure auto-upload on the stable branch, and build a binary with a specified Conda token. Additionally, run a final job to report results, exiting with a failure code if any of the build jobs fail, are cancelled, or are skipped.
